content.heading: Agency Engagement
content.text: Reven Digital Marketing (the 'Agency') provides performance-based digital marketing services. Engaging with our services constitutes acceptance of our data-driven protocols.

content.heading: Performance Benchmarks
content.text: While we strive for extreme revenue velocity, performance is subject to market volatility and algorithmic shifts across third-party platforms.

content.heading: Data Extraction
content.text: We only collect deterministic signals required for high-fidelity attribution and campaign optimization.

content.heading: Security Infrastructure
content.text: All client data is encrypted using military-grade protocols to ensure absolute sovereignty.
